dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE & ADMINISTRATION Use the lowest effective dose for the patient. • Use the lowest dose effective for the patient ( 2 ) • Recommended initial dose is 1 mg, immediately before bedtime, with at least 7 to 8 hours remaining before the planned time of awakening. May increase dose if clinically indicated, to a maximum of 3 mg ( 2.1 ) • Geriatric or debilitated patients: Dose should not exceed 2 mg ( 2.2 ) • Patients with severe hepatic impairment, or taking potent CYP3A4 inhibitors: Dose shoul
